turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Good morning. I need to book two back to back appointments — one for me and one for my daughter. Same department, paediatrics and... uh, one for me in general medicine.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Good morning! Of course. Let me start with yours. Your name and number?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: For you with Dr. Ramesh Iyer in general medicine — 10 AM tomorrow. For Kavya with Dr. Anita Saraf paediatrics — 10:30 AM same day. That way you can finish both in one trip.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: That's so thoughtful! Yes, please book both.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Both confirmed — Meenakshi Iyer 10 AM and Kavya Iyer 10:30 AM tomorrow. Two SMS confirmations coming. Anything else?
